name: fssphone
description: Web-based FSS phone call simulator for VATSIM with WebRTC voice communication

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd worker && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev:local"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev:local" "cd electron && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.build:electron: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build && npm run dist
